name: Knach Kuchen
recipeIngredient: Butter; piece size of a walnut
recipeInstructions:
1. Mix the sponge with a piece of butter the size of a walnut.
2. Combine well and place in a greased bread loaf pan.
3. Let rise until double in bulk.
4. Bake at moderate temperature (350 - 400 F) for about 40 - 50 minutes.
